scenarios.description: Calling setTrackPosition(true) sets trackPosition flag to true and returns the same Parser instance
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); // initial trackPosition false by default
scenarios.expectedResult: returned instance is the same as parser; parser.isTrackPosition() == true

scenarios.description: Calling setTrackPosition(false) sets trackPosition flag to false and returns the same Parser instance
scenarios.expectedResult: returned instance is the same as parser; parser.isTrackPosition() == false
